vision.verse1: "See, I am doing a new thing! Now it springs up; do you not perceive it?
vision.verse2: I am making a way in the wilderness and streams in the wasteland."

about.summary:
At this critical moment,
the wind of the Holy Spirit is blowing to every corner of this generation.
God's will is not only within the four walls of the church,
but to expand the place of the tent,
entering AI generations, forward-looking technology, business transformation,
medical missions, and environmental governance to take authority!
about.details:
We firmly believe that 2026 will be a year of "alignment" for Asian churches and workplace leaders.
The Lord is calling His elite soldiers,
whether at the forefront of the digital wave,
or in the position of guarding the created earth,
to arise and shine, winning the cultural mountaintops of this generation for the Lord.

The "2026 Impact Asia Alliance Summit" is about to begin!
We see that God's glorious plan has been set in motion.
This is not just a gathering,
but a spiritual convergence,
a feast preparing for the future of God's Kingdom.
As the computing power of AI reshapes the world,
we are standing at the most critical turning point of human civilization.

In October 2026, the IAA International Summit
will initiate a divine conversation in Phoenix, Arizona.

In the future AI era, how humans can return to the role of "steward,"
finding a way of coexistence between technology and the soul.
This is not just a gathering of digital intelligence,
lifestyle aesthetics, and Christian faith.

It is a rebirth of thought in the magnificent desert landscape.
We sincerely invite you to walk with leaders from around the world,
gathering and conversing for the peace, wisdom, and love of the future world.
We look forward to witnessing the dawn from God's creation to eternal future with you in Phoenix, USA.

The church should enter society and produce world influence.

Let us stand on the breach together,
becoming vessels to receive new wine.

Going to Phoenix, North America in 2026,
blessing the union of North American and Asia-Pacific churches,

We invite you to witness with us
God's wondrous work of making streams in the desert and paths in the wilderness!

timelineSection.title: A New Generation of Faith in Asia
timelineSection.subtitle: OUR JOURNEY (2022 - 2026)

themes.title: Digital Transformation & AI Future
themes.summary: Exploring how AI can lead corporate transformation based on faith, achieving technological breakthroughs in the wilderness.

detail.heading: Rebirth in the Digital Wilderness
detail.intro: As AI technology sweeps across the wasteland like a storm, under the scorching sun of Phoenix, Arizona, we explore the core question: Can technology truly bring freedom to the soul?

points.title: The Clash of AI and Faith Ethics
points.desc: Exploring the divine source of human dignity and creativity in an era dominated by algorithms.

points.title: From Complex Data to Life Wisdom
points.desc: How to maintain focus on the sustainable vision of the Kingdom in an age of information explosion.

points.title: The Covenant Model of AI in Corporate Governance
points.desc: Practicing data justice, making technology a servant to all.

themes.title: Kingdom Impact Leadership
themes.summary: How to maintain spiritual vitality and exercise the value of servant leadership in a high-pressure competitive business jungle.

detail.heading: Contemporary Challenges of Servant Leadership
detail.intro: In a volatile, uncertain, and chaotic business environment, true leadership stems from the stability of the soul.

points.title: Oasis in the Desert
points.desc: The integration of work and spirituality.

points.title: Connecting Generations
points.desc: How to pass on a cross-cultural Kingdom vision.

points.title: Growth in Adversity
points.desc: How wilderness experiences shape resilient character.

themes.title: Land Stewardship & Sustainability
themes.summary: Guarding creation as stewards, connecting ESG with the practice and commitment of sustainable business models.

detail.heading: Rethinking Stewardship
detail.intro: The desert landscape of Phoenix reminds us: every drop of water, every inch of land is entrusted to us by the Creator.

points.title: ESG Practices from a Biblical Perspective
points.desc: Building sustainable strategies from covenant theology.

points.title: Supply Chain Transparency & Labor Justice
points.desc: The glocalized implementation of business ethics.

points.title: Greening the Desert
points.desc: How business models can give back to creation.

venue.title: Venue Information
venue.name: First Baptist Church Tempe
venue.heading: Luxurious Tranquility in the Wilderness
venue.desc: Heading to Phoenix, North America in 2026 to bless the union of North American and Asia-Pacific churches. We invite you to witness with us Gods wondrous work of making streams in the desert and paths in the wilderness!

footer.brandDesc: Connecting Asian impact, transforming Kingdom values.
